questions.question: Is the model clearly identified with a unique model ID or name?
questions.guidance: Look for model name, ID, version number, or unique identifier

questions.question: Is the model purpose and intended use clearly documented?
questions.guidance: Look for statements about what the model is used for and in what context

questions.question: Is the model owner or responsible party identified?
questions.guidance: Look for ownership, accountability, or responsible team/person

questions.question: Is the development dataset described including size and time period?
questions.guidance: Look for sample size, observation period, data sources used in development

questions.question: Are model assumptions clearly stated and justified?
questions.guidance: Look for explicit assumptions about data, relationships, or model behaviour

questions.question: Is the model methodology or algorithm described?
questions.guidance: Look for description of statistical technique, algorithm, or modelling approach

questions.question: Are model performance metrics reported?
questions.guidance: Look for Gini, AUC, KS statistic, R-squared, or other performance measures

questions.question: Has the model been validated on an out-of-sample or out-of-time dataset?
questions.guidance: Look for holdout sample, test set, or out-of-time validation results

questions.question: Are model limitations and weaknesses documented?
questions.guidance: Look for explicit statements about model limitations, known weaknesses, or areas of uncertainty

questions.question: Is there evidence of model approval by a relevant committee or authority?
questions.guidance: Look for approval records, sign-off, or governance committee references

questions.question: Is a model monitoring or review schedule documented?
questions.guidance: Look for periodic review dates, monitoring frequency, or trigger events for review

questions.question: Are model change controls or version history documented?
questions.guidance: Look for version history, change log, or amendment records
